title: WASHINGTON COUNTY WOODCUTTERS - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY WOODCUTTERS INC WASHINGTON COUNTY WOODCUTTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and delivers firewood. No financial assistance available. Eligibility: Low-income adults age 55 and older Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 862-7874 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 862-7874 Main phone Main phone (503) 862-7874 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
